case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES VS BERROTERAN, JULIO

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BERROTERAN, JULIO
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BERROTERAN, JULIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERROTERAN, JULIO $2,370.70 PRINCIPAL, $64.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,435.49 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
LETTER FROM AVCO RECEIVED AND SENT TO JUDGE HOFF FOR CLARIFICATION OF JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BERROTERAN, JULIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,370.70 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT BERROTERAN, JULIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-02-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
